MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_JUSTICE_POWER.title: Justice
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_JUSTICE_POWER.descrip: Heal at end of turn and lose 1 stack.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_JUSTICE_POWER.smartDe: Heal {Amount} HP at the end of your turn.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_PERJURY_POWER.title: Perjury
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_PERJURY_POWER.descrip: Every 5 stacks convert into 1 stack of Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_PERJURY_POWER.smartDe: Every 5 stacks convert into 1 stack of Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_FIFTEEN_POWER.de: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_FIFTEEN_POWER.sm: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Justice.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_TWENTY_FIVE_POWE: Discard all cards in your hand and gain that many 26s.

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_TWENTY_POWER.des: When Perjury converts into Justice, draw 1 card and gain 1 Energy.

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_TWO_POWER.descri: At end of turn, trigger an additional Justice heal effect.

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CARD_TWO_POWER.title: CardTwoPower
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_DEATH_REWIND_POWER.de: On death, revive and heal HP equal to your Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_DEATH_REWIND_POWER.sm: On death, revive and heal HP equal to your Witchification.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_RITUAL_CEREMONY_POWER: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Strength, 1 Energy, and draw 1 card.
At the start of your turn, gain 1 Strength, 1 Energy, and draw 1 card.
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_WITH_POWER.descriptio: For every 10 Witchification, deal 1 extra Strength-like damage. At 100, gain magic.

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_WITH_POWER.title: Witchification

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_AAM_POWER.title: Ama's Guardian
MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_AAM_POWER.description: Redirect the target's intent to an ally.

MANOSABA_LIN_POWER_CRIMSONBUTTERFLY_POWE: Record damage taken this turn. At the start of each turn, heal HP equal to the recorded amount, then lose 1 stack. Each stack extends duration by 1 turn.
